LanguageData.Ammo_LaserChargePack.label: laser charge pack
LanguageData.Ammo_LaserChargePack.description: A universal charge pack for various laser weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_LaserChargePack_Mech.label: mechanoid laser pack
LanguageData.Ammo_LaserChargePack_Mech.description: A mechanoid manufactured charge pack for laser weapons.
